subcodes.first_line: God maketh mention of His servants who have turned unto Him and directed themselves toward His most exalted horizon when the Lord of Names appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یذکر الله عباده الذین اقبلوا الیه و توجهوا الی افقه الاعلی اذ اتی مالک الاسماء
